title: Patch Width Control
description: Implement hard AST size limiters to prevent Scope Explosion.

title: Project OS Substrate
description: Evolve the dashboard into a core OS switching interface.

title: Symbol Graph Retrieval
description: Advanced dependency traversal for Coder Agents.
impact: Fixes Retrieval Failures on deeply nested codebases.

title: Adaptive Strategy Policies
description: Dynamically adjust State Machine retries using the Failure Miner.
impact: Reduces wasted token spend on loop-trapped strategies.

title: Autonomous Development Loop
description: Live SSE telemetry and backlog execution triggers.
impact: Closes the autonomous execution loop for UI-driven self-improvement.

title: Autonomous Scheduler
description: Level-B autonomous discovery: scheduler mines failure_db and backlog, scores candidates, and dispatches improvement runs without human input.
impact: Closes the continuous autonomous development loop.

title: Mission Control UI
description: Full observation surface for the autonomous loop: active runs, task pipeline view, scheduler feed, failure intelligence, development metrics.
impact: Makes autonomous development observable and governable from the browser.

title: Strategy Branch Racing
description: Speculative parallelism: generate 2-3 candidate strategies per issue, run in parallel sandboxes, select winner by score (success + patch_narrowness - cost).
impact: Increases first-pass success rate and reduces total retry latency.
